# Variant MCP

Variant MCP is the hosted Model Context Protocol integration for Variant, an AI-native presentation editor for HTML/CSS slide decks.

Endpoint: https://mcp.variant.art/mcp

Use HTTP transport. The public repository documents setup and examples; the production server implementation is hosted by Variant and maintained in Variant's internal codebase.

Key docs:

- README.md
- .plugin/plugin.json
- .mcp.json
- docs/clients/claude-code.md
- docs/clients/cursor.md
- docs/clients/codex.md
- docs/quickstart.md
- docs/authentication.md
- docs/tools.md
- docs/prompts.md
- docs/schema-summary.md
- docs/use-cases.md
- docs/troubleshooting.md
- docs/faq.md

Canonical web pages:

- https://variant.art/mcp
- https://variant.art/docs/mcp
- https://variant.art/docs/mcp-tools
- https://variant.art/docs/presentation-mcp-server

Core tools include decks.list, deck.get, deck.create, deck.update, deck.listSlides, slides.batchUpdate, slide.get, slide.edit, slide.preview, asset.upload, deck.export, deck.export.status, deck.shareLinks.create, deck.trash, deck.activity.list, slide.versions.list, comments.list, comments.update, brand.context, and brand.update. The server supports OAuth with refresh tokens and scoped bearer tokens.
